headline: J&J starts head-to-head PFA trial against Boston Scientific device
summary: The study will compare outcomes on J&J’s Varipulse Pro platform and Boston Scientific’s rival Farapulse PFA system.

headline: Medical Robotics Market Size to Grow USD 102.75 Billion by 2035 | Research by SNS Insider
summary: The United States medical robotics market was estimated to be worth USD 9.87 billion in 2025 and is projected to increase at 16.00% CAGR from 2026 to 2035, reaching USD 43.16 billion. headline: Medtronic announces CE Mark for Stealth AXiS™ surgical system
summary: Medtronic, a global leader in healthcare technology, has received CE mark for the Stealth AXiS™ surgical system, a next-generation platform that brings planning, navigation, and robotics together into one single, intelligent system. The Stealth AXiS™ system is indicated for spine and cranial procedures, highlighting the platform's scalability across multiple surgical specialties for Medtronic.

headline: Medtronic Cyber Breach Meets Cardiac Breakthroughs And Pressured Share Price
summary: Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) reported a cybersecurity incident involving unauthorized access to certain IT systems, with no impact disclosed on patient safety, manufacturing, or core operations. The company indicated it does not expect a material financial effect from the breach, while continuing to review potential risks to patient and health data. In parallel, Medtronic secured FDA Breakthrough Device Designation for its Sphere-9 catheter in ventricular tachycardia and presented positive six month...
